page: Microsoft Azure DC32ds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the DDCSv3 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server features 32 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.8 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core, alongside 2458 GB of local storage. The CPU includes 48 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, Intel Deep Learning Boost (AVX512_VNNI), and cryptographic acceleration via AES and SHA_NI.

In benchmark evaluations, the DC32ds_v3 demonstrates strong multi-core processing capabilities, scoring 60370.55 in stress-ng multi-core CPU tests and 17264.0 in Geekbench multi-core assessments. Its cryptographic performance is notable, with a PassMark CPU encryption score of 36927.97. Database operations are highly efficient, registering 25047.25 on PassMark database tests, while static web serving throughput reaches 48.38 GB/sec. However, single-core performance and memory bandwidth remain in the average tier, and large-model LLM text generation represents a performance bottleneck, with the 70B model achieving only 2.64 tokens/sec.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial local storage capacity, this server offers a resource-dense profile suitable for memory-intensive workloads without requiring dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of dedicated physical cores and premium storage capability makes it highly suitable for relational databases, enterprise-level database operations, and high-throughput static web serving. It is also well-suited for multi-threaded data processing tasks, such as image processing and software compilation, where its strong multi-core performance can be fully leveraged.
description: Microsoft Azure DC32ds_v3 is a memory-optimized server from the DDCSv3 family, utilizing 32 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8370C cores running at 2.8 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 256.0 GB of RAM (8.0 GB per core) and 2458 GB of local storage. Operating under Microsoft Hyper-V, the server supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and SHA_NI. Benchmarks indicate strong multi-core performance, with a PassMark CPU score of 49816.66 and high database operation throughput. However, single-core performance and large-model LLM text generation are limited. This server is optimized for memory-intensive applications, relational databases, and multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC32ds_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC32ds_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 32 Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and substantial local storage for demanding database and multi-threaded workloads.

256.0 GB of RAM paired with 2458 GB of local storage
Strong multi-core performance and database operation benchmarks
